name: content-shell
description: Content shell (default demo: viewer / markdown-view over HTTPS :443).

scripts.ssl:localhost: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout certs/key.pem -out certs/cert.pem -days 825 -subj '/CN=localhost' -addext 'subjectAltName=DNS:localhost,DNS:*.localhost,IP:127.0.0.1,IP:::1'
scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='certs/cert.pem';if(!fs.existsSync(p))console.warn('\\n[content-shell] No certs/'+p.split('/').pop()+'. Run: npm run ssl:localhost\\n');"
